title: [LST]轻生电【Lightweight_Survival_Technical】
description: A meticulously crafted Fabric modpack that delivers the perfect balance between peak performance and rich functionality. Experience buttery-smooth gameplay with all the essential tools for technical Minecraft players - without any compromises. Where perfor
body:
## English Description

**Lightweight_Survival_Technical** is a meticulously optimized Fabric client modpack designed for technical survival players who demand both exceptional performance and comprehensive functionality. We understand the critical need for smooth gameplay and efficient tools in technical Minecraft, which is why we've carefully selected and fine-tuned every mod to create this **lightning-fast, stable, and feature-complete** solution.

### 🚀 Performance Excellence
- **Optimal Frame Rates**: Significantly improved FPS across all hardware configurations
- **Reduced Lag Spikes**: Smooth and consistent gameplay even in demanding technical setups
- **Memory Efficient**: Optimized resource usage for extended play sessions

### 🛠️ Core Features
- **Performance Foundation**: Sodium, Lithium, Iris for maximum performance
- **Technical Toolkit**: Litematica, MiniHUD, Tweakeroo for precision work
- **Quality of Life**: Item Scroller, Mouse Tweaks, Jade, AppleSkin
- **Essential Utilities**: VoxelMap, JEI with Pinyin search, Mod Menu
- **Full Localization**: Complete Chinese language support

### 🎯 Essential Keybinds
| Key | Function |
|-----|----------|
| J | Precise Block Placement |
| Y | Fake Sneak |
| N | Fast Block Placement |
| C | Fast Right-Click |
| R | Free Camera |
| G | Gamma Adjustment |
| V | Permanent Sprint |
| Right ALT | Fast Left-Click |

## 💫 Why Choose Lightweight_Survival_Technical?

**"Lightweight_Survival_Technical" represents the perfect synergy between raw performance and practical functionality.** We've eliminated the traditional compromise between FPS and features, delivering a package that excels in both areas. Every mod has been tested for compatibility, every configuration optimized for technical gameplay.

Whether you're building complex redstone contraptions, planning massive constructions with Litematica, or optimizing your survival experience, this modpack provides the reliable foundation you need. Focus on your creations while we handle the technical optimizations.

---

*Experience the perfect balance of speed and functionality today!*

---

## 中文介绍

**轻生电**整合包是专为Minecraft技术性生存玩家深度定制的高性能Fabric客户端解决方案。我们深刻理解生电玩家对游戏流畅度、操作效率和功能完整性的极致需求，为此精心优化每一个模组，打造出这个**轻量、迅捷、功能全面**的专业级平台。

### 🚀 性能表现
- **极致流畅**：在各种硬件配置下均能显著提升帧率
- **稳定运行**：有效减少卡顿，保证复杂场景下的流畅体验
- **资源优化**：内存占用合理，支持长时间稳定运行

### 🛠️ 核心功能
- **性能基石**：钠、锂、虹膜三件套提供顶级性能
- **生电工具**：投影、迷你HUD、Tweakeroo精准操作
- **效率提升**：物品滚轮、鼠标手势、玉查看器、苹果皮
- **必备功能**：体素地图、拼音搜索JEI、模组菜单
- **完整汉化**：所有模组均已完整汉化

### 🎯 核心快捷键
| 快捷键 | 功能 |
|--------|------|
| J | 精准方块放置 |
| Y | 伪潜行 |
| N | 快速方块放置 |
| C | 快速右键连点 |
| R | 灵魂出窍 |
| G | 伽马值修改 |
| V | 永久疾跑 |
| 右ALT | 快速左键连点 |

## 💫 选择轻生电的理由

**「轻生电」不仅仅是一个模组集合，而是性能与功能完美平衡的艺术品。** 我们打破了"要么性能，要么功能"的传统束缚，让您同时享受极致的流畅体验和完整的技术工具。每个模组都经过兼容性测试，每项配置都为生电场景深度优化。

无论您是在设计精妙的红石机械，使用投影规划宏伟建筑，还是优化生存发展流程，「轻生电」都将成为您最可靠的创作伙伴。让您专注于创意实现，而无需担忧技术限制。

---

*立即体验，感受速度与功能的完美融合！*
